reviews.review_description:
There are a few things the developer has to fix, but it is a totally new game, so this I expect... overall, this game is a good VR game! 
I believe he looks at his discord suggestions and will implement some of the requests AND  fix the glitches! 

Played today,  1/6/26, same Glitches, can no longer support a 5 star... 

Maybe it's an abandoned game, it's soooo many of those too

reviews.review_title: Definitely a must try! A few issues.
reviews.review_description: At what level do you get a shopping cart? How many levels are there? I'm at level 43. The people get stuck at the door a lot. Too much cleaning. Leveled up several times and didn't get anything new. New decorations would be nice, why only Halloween stuff and nothing new ever added? Would be nice to get wall pictures. The broom falls in the floor too much and it's a pain picking it up. Other than this the game is great. A must try!
Good bye

I am so obsessed with this game. I make fun of myself for working at a grocery store for fun. Before I know it I've been playing for hours. The downside, I maxed out on new stuff pretty quickly. I've unlocked everything there is, so now there really isn't much more to look forward to. I'm just hoping updates with new products will come out often. I'd even pay for the updates. Since I've found this game I've looked around at all the games like it to see if they have more stuff, but didn't care for any of the others. Great game!!
My game got erased twice when I was soo far from the game I don't know why it did that and I'm mad and I can't get it old file back and it stink that there's no multiple file to choose.

One major improvement could make the game even more enjoyable: adding workers to help with cleaning. While managing a store is fun, constantly having to pick up trash and tidy up can become tedious, disrupting the otherwise relaxing flow. Having an automated cleaning system or hiring staff to handle the mess would keep the experience smooth and maintain its ASMR-friendly appeal , Also there should be an option to have a door for the storage room it kinda feels unsafe without one.

reviews.review_title: Wonderful hopefully the dev sees this
reviews.review_description: I genuinely give this game a 10/10—no exaggeration. It’s absolutely wonderful. I feel like a cheerful little shopkeeper, warmly welcoming customers into my cozy store. There’s something so comforting and satisfying about it all—sweeping the floors, chatting with customers, counting change, restocking shelves, and running the cash register. Even just running around and crouching down to tidy up feels fun. I’ve always dreamed of a game like this, especially in VR—and now it’s finally here. It makes me so happy.
Love the game just wish you could put the menu  on your rite hand￼ and place furniture with your left hand ￼

When I was little I used to play this roblox game called retail tycoon. This game is almost like that. Basically you buy a completely empty store with a budget and let’s say you buy like some shelves, registers and products. Then you just upgrade over time by the more sales you get your store such as the design, shelving, cleanness, size, etc.. 10/10



Some suggestions: 

First of all, the office/back area has no door. That makes me feel a bit in danger. 

A manager service, this guy would order more product in for the store.

A better system of what products are missing/not. It only shows the bare minimum but doesn’t completely allow for a complete full stock of shelves. 

More decorations/music? It’s very very simple and completely barren I feel like. I mean you did did halloween decorations but I feel like more stuff like plants, music, seating, benches, trees, vending machines, etc. 

Multiplayer…

Overall it’s a great game with tons of potential. 100% worth the money since it’s very fun.

Easy to follow guide at start. easy game to play standing or sitting down.

love how you can crouch with 1 button to pick up things . yay.

the younger children loved this game to .and it helped them count money .as in giving the change back to the customers.
they loved working in a shop.


i haven't bought a game on meta for ages  but I'm so glad i did - i play this every night.

Glitches 
* rubbish under pavement/invisible outside shop _ i have to run brush along the pavement so I can hear the sound where it is .

Has the developer left us _  don't seem  to get updates anymore 😕
I can’t pick stuff up off the floor!!! I’ve tried adjusting the guardian floor height and my own height.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that!

There is a crouch button on the right thumbstick button that you can use to make this easier.

Let me know if you need further help!

reviews.review_description: Love the game I hope It receives another update eventually

reviews.review_title: I have to return the game :(
reviews.review_description:
Unfortunately, because I love this concept and have fun with playing something like this in the steam deck.

So I was happy to find it for my Meta Quest 3.

But with this game, I have so much problems…

- even using Teleportation, I feel bad after playing this game. I never have issues motion sickness and teleportation, only in this game. I don’t understand why, but I had to stop after the tutorial and say one and feel sick now.

- i wish I can point on the trash and just grab it standing and that I then have a trashbag and don’t have to run for every trash item to the container on the side. I can only hold two items.

- when the customers want to pay, the cash registers blinked blue; normal, blue, normal. And then it was moving during trying to give the customers their money. 

- music is missing, but I could play my music…

But feeling sick because of a game even in teleport mode is a game breaker for me :(

My biggest thing is ......this game should have multi-player.  It would be so fun being able to run a store with friends. A couple friends and I do play VRmart free in vrchat which isn't as well built as this one, but the multi-player aspects so fun. Much prefer it over npc staff. 

Plus, it's super difficult to keep stuff in stock and keep things clean . Especially when the dirty spots fall *under* the sidewalk and you can't see it. I have to just clean whole side walk hoping to find the messy areas. Can never get the clean meter all the way clean or even half. It's always stuck just below dirty.

I do love the graphics and the wide variety of furniture and food choices. Never managed to get full star ratings from my customers even when everything's in stock and they don't have to wait in line for their purchases.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thanks for the review!

For Multiplayer, I am hoping to finish the core gameplay and fix any issues before thinking about moving the game to multiplayer as I am currently a solo developer :)

Yesterday I added a new service where you can hire restockers to support your running this store, don't forget to check the service app on the computer!

For the 5 stars, make sure the store is clean and no graffitti are on the walls in and outside the store.

Thanks again for the kind words and looking forward to improve the game to get the missing 2 stars on the review haha

reviews.review_description:
Good game but very glitchy. Customers walk up to the door, then turn around and leave for no reason when the store is open. Customers walk in and then claim they can’t find items that the shelves are full of. I added a self checkout kiosk and customers walk into the side of it, get “stuck” then turn around and leave. Customers stand in front of the shelves and then leave because they can’t reach the shelves. The game says making the store “popular” will bring more customers, but doesn’t say how to do that. After I cleaned the store for the first time, it never got dirty again so I’m not sure what the point of the clean/dirty gauge is. 

It’s also pretty repetitive. I wish the glitches were fixed, I wish you could point and click on items rather than crouching, I wish you could purchase store decorations because the store looks like a prison, and I  really wish you could move items once you’ve placed them on shelves so you could group the same items together.

developer_response.body:
Hi Amanda!

The issues that you mentioend are all fixed now. we also added new content.

Have fun!

reviews.review_description: it can be really cool to buy arcade machine or something like that to play and kill time ;)

developer_response.body:
Great idea!
Added it to my list haha

reviews.review_description: I had to start over constantly cause the game was broken and bugged. It got boring and it’s nothing compared to the original

I am really enjoying this game, it is very relaxing to do the tasks and check out the customers. However, I am having trouble because I'm stuck in the floor. I played the game earlier, but now even though I restarted my headset, I am stuck in the floor and cannot move. Also, it will be helpful if you could point and click the trash instead of having to crouch down to get it. Those are my few 
recommendations and you have a gem on your hands!!


Edited to add. Customers are claiming they can't find items that I have on the shelves. Can you please fix?

developer_response.body: I pushed new changes imporiving the customers navigations. I am also improveing them more.

reviews.review_description: Unplayable for me unfortunately every time i pointed on register screen it would want to move the register.

I just got this game today. Spent most of the day playing it, lol. And I got to say, absolutely fun. I got it because I have so many store games on my phone, love playing those. Seen this game, and risked the money, and so glad I did. So far, I'm only on day 8, level 5. And I can't wait to get further. Definitely recommend if you enjoy games where you're building up your business from scratch. 

Was reading the reviews and noticed someone saying the store doesn't get cleaned 100% and that's true. The only time it stays clean is when you have the store closed.

Would be cool if you could add stuff to the cart if you are running low on the supplies, from the spot that tells you when you are out of a product. The dirt spots need to be more visible. I have to drag the mop up and down the sidewalk next to the store to find them. The only time they are visible is in the store. There should be an adjustable bar for the players height. I'm a short person and I have to keep switching between sitting and standing to pick stuff up, or that could just be the game. The small trash can in the store isn't catching everything. I put a brush and a can in there and it wouldn't throw it away. I hate that the boxes I have put up in the office end up outside when I log back in. Now I know getting the storage and the shelves will stop that, but still sucks. There should be a button for rotation when placing furniture. The turning thing does not allow a specific placement on a specific wall unless I turn myself. It would be nice to have a take back button from a shelf, I currently have small water bottles on two different shelves, and I did not want that. 

Will come back for updates if need be.
